name: Dr. Sulaiman Al Habib Medical Services Group Company
summary: Dr. Sulaiman Al Habib Medical Services Group Company develops, owns, and operates hospitals and medical centers. The company operates spinal surgery, vascular, general medicine, urology, dental, diabetes and endocrine, ENT, family medicine, gastroenterology, general surgery, sport medicine, rheumatology, internal medicine, nutrition, nephrology, neurology, neurosurgery, orthopedic, OB/GYN, pulmonary, psychiatry, pediatric, and pain treatment clinics. It also operates physiotherapy, plastic surgery, cardiology, dermatology, in vitro fertilization, obesity treatment, ophthalmology, and laser hair removal centers; endoscopy, speech therapy, intensive care, hematology, kidney dialysis, sleep disorder treatment, laser and Lasik eye surgery, nuclear medicine, low vision, and ER units; a tissue laboratory and radiology center; and pharmacies. Dr. Sulaiman Al Habib Medical Services Group Company was founded in 1995 and is based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
